{{CargoRelic
|name=Adari 2600
|class_id=22117
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|birthday=10-17
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.06%), Wishing (0.02%)
|description=On Oct 17, 1977 AD, Adari Corporation released the Adari 2600 home video game console.<br>Adari 2600 is one of the earliest and the most iconic home video game consoles. These game consoles stayed on the shelf for fifteen years, selling a total of 30 million units. Although it withdrew from the market due to software developers producing low-quality games, it introduced the public to the concept of home video game consoles, sparking the development of the video game industry.
|fame=73
|art=37
|fth=39
|civ=46
|tech=48
|ss1=Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +9<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail DEF +9<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss2=Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +12<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail DEF +12<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss3=Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +15<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail DEF +15<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss4=Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +21<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail DEF +21<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss5=Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +27<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail DEF +27<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss7=Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +27<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail DEF +27<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20<br>Snail DEF +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Dungbeetle skill II.png|50px]]Place in Dung Beetle Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion RUSH +4.5%
|skill2=[[File:Dungbeetle skill II.png|50px]]Place in Dung Beetle Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion ATK +4.5%
}}
